qa_pairs.question: What is out-of-core learning in Scikit-learn?
qa_pairs.answer: Out-of-core learning in Scikit-learn is a strategy that involves leaving a dataset on disk and loading it in batches during training. This method is similar to how deep learning packages work and is used when a dataset is too large to fit entirely in memory.

qa_pairs.question: Under what condition can out-of-core learning be utilized with a Scikit-learn estimator?
qa_pairs.answer: Out-of-core learning is a viable option in Scikit-learn when an estimator has the `partial_fit` method available, allowing it to process data incrementally in batches.
